targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.solunar.rating" and r._field == "value") |> last()
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.solunar.ratingName" and r._field == "value_str") |> last()
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.solunar.activeKind" and r._field == "value_str") |> last()
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.solunar.minutesToNextMajor" and r._field == "value") |> last()
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.moon.illumination" and r._field == "value") |> last()

from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-30m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.wind.averageSpeed" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> sort(columns:["_time"], desc:true) |> limit(n:1)
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.sun.sunrise" and r._field == "value_str") |> last()
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.sun.sunset" and r._field == "value_str") |> last()

panels.title: Min to Sunrise
panels.description: Negative = event already passed today. Next sunrise at dawn shows positive again.

targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.sun.sunrise" and r._field == "value_str") |> last() |> map(fn:(r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: int(v: time(v: r._value)) - int(v: now())) / 60000000000.0}))

from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:-10m) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "environment.sun.sunset" and r._field == "value_str") |> last() |> map(fn:(r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: int(v: time(v: r._value)) - int(v: now())) / 60000000000.0}))
from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start: now(), stop: 2h) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "weather.forecast" and r._field == "cloudCover") |> first()

from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start: now(), stop: 2h) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "weather.forecast" and r._field == "pressure") |> first() |> map(fn:(r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 100.0}))

panels.title: Perch / Zander Fishability — next 24 h
panels.description: 0.40 × solunar + 0.30 × dawn/dusk + 0.20 × wind sweet-spot (2-5 m/s) + 0.10 × cloud. Higher = better.

panels.title: Solunar Score — next 24 h
panels.description: 0 = poor, 4 = excellent. Peaks at moon transits and dawn/dusk.

targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:now(), stop:24h) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "solunar.forecast" and r._field == "score") |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])

panels.title: Wind — next 24 h
panels.description: Sweet spot for perch/zander is 2–5 m/s. Shaded area marks that band.

targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:now(), stop:24h) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "weather.forecast" and (r._field == "windSpeed" or r._field == "windGust")) |> keep(columns:["_time","_field","_value"]) |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"],columnKey:["_field"],valueColumn:"_value")

panels.title: Perch / Zander Fishability — 7 days
panels.description: Combined fishability bar chart. Best windows show green; dead hours show red.

targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:now(), stop:7d) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "solunar.forecast" and r._field == "score") |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])

from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:now(), stop:7d) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "weather.forecast" and (r._field == "windSpeed" or r._field == "windGust")) |> keep(columns:["_time","_field","_value"]) |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"],columnKey:["_field"],valueColumn:"_value")

panels.title: Cloud Cover & Precipitation — 7 days
panels.description: Overcast + light rain often triggers perch/zander surface feeding.

targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:now(), stop:7d) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "weather.forecast" and (r._field == "cloudCover" or r._field == "precip")) |> keep(columns:["_time","_field","_value"]) |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"],columnKey:["_field"],valueColumn:"_value")

panels.title: Temperature & Pressure — 7 days
panels.description: Falling pressure tends to trigger feeding activity.

targets.query: from(bucket:"signalk") |> range(start:now(), stop:7d) |> filter(fn:(r) => r._measurement == "weather.forecast" and (r._field == "temp" or r._field == "pressure")) |> keep(columns:["_time","_field","_value"]) |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"],columnKey:["_field"],valueColumn:"_value") |> map(fn:(r) => ({_time:r._time, temp_c:r.temp - 273.15, pressure_hpa:r.pressure / 100.0}))
